hero.title: Mentorship & Scholarship Platform for Studying in China
hero.subtitle: Academic guidance, scholarship profile building, and support throughout the application process at your own pace.
hero.quote: Academic guidance, scholarship profile building, and support throughout the application process at your own pace.
hero.highlight: Scholarship is not just about scores, but how your profile is positioned.
hero.description: ChinaHack helps you from profile strategy, essays, extracurriculars to interview preparation, following a clear roadmap with dedicated support.
hero.storyPrompt: Let your profile tell a story

about.heading: About ChinaHack
about.body: ChinaHack is a platform connecting mentees and mentors in the journey to study in China. We provide academic guidance, support for building scholarship profiles, and comprehensive mentoring.

whyChoose.heading: Why Choose ChinaHack for Your Scholarship Journey?
whyChoose.description: Our mentoring structure is designed with academic logic: clear direction, clear milestones, clear outcomes for each application round.

services.heading: Three Support Levels, Three Different Ways of Mentorship
services.description: Each package is designed for a different readiness level, from initial guidance to close mentoring at critical milestones.
services.balanceNote: Balances strategy development, coaching, and self-directed learning effectively.

process.heading: ChinaHack Mentoring Process
process.title: Clear Steps, Following the Scholarship Application Flow
process.description: Each stage has specific outcomes so mentees know where they are, what to prepare next, and when to move to the next step.

mentors.heading: Team of Expert Mentors
mentors.description: Each mentor represents a core competency: academic guidance, scholarship profile strategy, and optimization of each admission round.

universities.heading: Featured Universities
universities.subtitle: Where are ChinaHack Mentees Studying?
universities.description: From top-tier universities to scholarship-appropriate choices, ChinaHack guides pathways based on fit rather than just prestigious names.

community.heading: ChinaHack Community
community.subtitle: Connect Mentees Through Our Channels
community.description: Follow scholarship updates, application experiences, and real insights from our mentee community on channels we update daily.

leadForm.heading: Get Your Profile Reviewed
leadForm.subtitle: Request Consultation Now
leadForm.title: Application Support
leadForm.description: Let ChinaHack help you build a strong scholarship profile.
leadForm.name: Full Name
leadForm.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.tagline: Study in China with a Personalized Pathway
footer.description: Supporting students on their journey through academic planning, scholarship profile building, and China study applications.
